title: haworthiopsis × major
intro: Haworthiopsis × major, also known as the major succulent, is a unique hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Haworthia truncata and Haworthia fasciata. This plant is valued for its fleshy, thick leaves with white or yellow markings, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine. The leaves of the Haworthiopsis × major plant contain flavonoids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, contributing to its medicinal value. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which are believed to promote digestive health and boost the immune system.
